title: Why Inventing General Relativity Is the Final Test for AI - Adam Brown
summary: Adam Brown argues that the invention of general relativity represents the ultimate benchmark for AI capability, suggesting that true artificial general intelligence should be capable of reproducing major scientific breakthroughs. The discussion frames fundamental physics discovery as a measure of AI's ability to match or exceed human theoretical innovation.
